Rythmos® Secure Locking Band

Technical Specification & Installation Reference · Rev 2026

Secure wearability
Controlled removal
Waterproof

Overview

Rythmos® Secure Locking Band is a safety accessory designed to ensure continuous wearable usage for at-risk residents. It prevents easy removal while maintaining comfort and usability in daily care environments.

FUNCTIONS

Secures wearable device to at-risk residents
Prevents unauthorized removal of device
Ensures continuous monitoring compliance
Requires magnetic key for removal

Key Capabilities

Secure
Wearability

Staying
fixed for monitoring

Controlled
Removal

Unlocks
only with magnetic tool

Waterproof
Design

Safe
for shower and daily hygiene routines

Adjustable
Fit

Accommodates
different sizes

Comfort
Material

Flexible
band for long-term wear

System & Safety Features

Continuous device compliance: Ensures residents remain connected to monitoring systems

Supports high-risk residents: Ideal for wander risk and fall monitoring scenarios

Reduces device loss: Prevents removal or misplacement of wearables

Caregiver-controlled access: Only staff can remove device when required

Installation Guidelines

Setup

- Attach band securely to wearable
- Adjust size for proper wrist fit

Locking

- Engage locking mechanism fully
- Verify secure closure

Removal

- Use magnetic unlocking tool only
- Keep tool accessible to staff

Cleaning

- Waterproof — suitable for regular washing
- Wipe or rinse as needed

Care

- Check band integrity regularly
- Ensure locking mechanism functions properly

Usage

- Avoid excessive force or bending
- Store unlocking tool safely

intrexis.com
